rounds: Chemist aisle, nail shade comparing, zero flinching — that's a Track 1 and Track 3 double and he barely blinked. Necklace, black bag, Noskin loafers to Lavendra? His people, full picture, no armour — that one goes firmly to Matt. Pink toes held all week AND he actively packed the pink thong for Balmoral, which is a choice, not an accident. Joy police got the pink hat, the knit cardigan (until the challenge forced it), and the poncho at Balmoral — brave enough to make the choice, not quite brave enough to let anyone see it yet.
pattern: They're quiet with strangers, loud with his actual people — and they've been living inside some daily routines so long he can't even see them anymore.
focus: Look at one daily routine this week and ask — is this what I'd choose, or just what I do?
